title: harness-kit project config (.harness/config.json)
description: Per-project, git-tracked configuration that makes the bundled harness scripts project-agnostic. Every project literal (file globs, verify commands, layering rules, verification method, phase thresholds) lives here, never in plugin code.

projectType.description: Preset identity. Affects only the init scaffolder and advisor capability copy; bundled scripts never branch on it.

verificationMode.description: Consumed by on-stop-verify.sh. strict => exit 2 blocks premature completion; advisory => warn only. Overrides the userConfig default.

verifyCmd.description: Canonical verify entrypoint used by the Stop hook, the git pre-commit hook, and /harness-kit:verify. Defaults to the bundled harness-verify orchestrator.

buildCmd.description: Build/compile command, surfaced by the advisor/checklist (e.g. 'godot --headless --quit --path .' or 'npm run build').

testCmd.description: Test runner command (e.g. a headless gdunit script, or 'npm test -- --run').

gates.description: Ordered verification gates consumed by harness-verify. Replaces the hardcoded steps of the old verify.sh.

command.description: Shell command to run. Bundled gates (harness-check-layering, harness-doc-links, ...) resolve via the plugin bin dir, which harness-verify prepends to PATH.

blocking.description: false = soft gate: a failure warns but does not fail the aggregate (generalizes the old STRICT_GARDENING flag).

skipWhenProcess.description: Optional: skip this gate if a process matching this name is running (e.g. 'Godot' to avoid the editor project lock during a headless compile).

tier.description: Effort-routing tier. When effortRouting.enabled and the turn's effort is low/medium, only 'fast' gates run (others are logged as skipped). Default 'full' = runs only at high+ effort once routing is on. With routing off (default), tier is ignored and all gates run.

layeringRules.description: Consumed by harness-check-layering. Replaces the hardcoded Godot grep rules.

scope.description: Glob of files to check (e.g. 'scripts/ui/**/*.gd' or 'src/ui/**/*.{ts,tsx}').

forbidden.description: Regex that must NOT appear in files under scope (an illegal dependency).

message.description: Remediation text shown when the rule is violated.

plan.description: Plan lifecycle convention. Consumed by on-pre-edit (plan-gate), on-plan-approved, harness-check-plan-dod, advisor.

dir.description: Plan root; active/ and completed/ live under it.

codeGlob.description: Regex of file paths whose edits require a covering plan (e.g. '\.(gd|tscn)$' or '\.(ts|tsx|vue|svelte)$'). Empty = plan-gate disabled.

template.description: Path (relative to plugin templates or project) to the plan scaffold template; defaults to the bundled plan-template.md.

statusField.description: Field label parsed from a plan's frontmatter/header to read its lifecycle status (the old Godot config used '状态').

completedValue.description: The status value that means a plan is done and must live in completed/.

checklistRegex.description: Regex matching an unchecked DoD item.

requiredFields.description: Field labels every completed plan must contain (template-compliance check in doc-gardening).

docs.description: Doc-related paths. Consumed by on-session-start (keyDocs), harness-doc-links (scanRoots), harness-doc-gardening (architecturePath/qualityPath/stalenessDays/namingRule).

keyDocs.description: Docs surfaced in the session handoff.

scanRoots.description: Dirs scanned recursively for dead links (top-level *.md always scanned).

architecturePath.description: Architecture doc audited for drift by doc-gardening.

qualityPath.description: Quality/score doc audited for staleness by doc-gardening.

stalenessDays.description: Doc-gardening staleness threshold (days) for the qualityPath newest-date check.

placeholderPatterns.description: Substrings that mark unfinished placeholder docs (doc-gardening). Sensible English+CN defaults if omitted.

layerPathRegex.description: Regex extracting referenced layer paths from architecturePath; doc-gardening flags any that no longer exist on disk (forward drift).

layerBaseDir.description: Base dir whose immediate subdirectories are the architecture layers; doc-gardening flags any real subdir NOT declared in architecturePath (reverse drift). E.g. 'scripts' or 'src'.

layerIgnoreDirs.description: Subdirectory names under layerBaseDir that are exempt from the reverse-drift check (e.g. _autoload, utils).

namingGlob.description: Glob of files whose names are checked against namingDisallow.

namingDisallow.description: Regex on the basename-without-extension that must NOT match (e.g. '[A-Z]' to enforce snake_case).

metrics.description: Consumed by harness-advisor. Each metric counts files matching a glob. Replaces the old hardcoded find commands.

glob.description: Glob whose match count is the metric value (e.g. 'docs/exec-plans/completed/*.md').

exclude.description: Optional regex; matching files are excluded from the count (e.g. exclude '_template.md').

enabledCapabilities.description: User-owned on/off switches for harness behaviors (replaces the old maturity-phase auto-router). Absent keys default ON for stable capabilities, OFF for experimental ones. Engines guard with harness_cap_enabled. The trace-driven suggester (harness-trace-analyze) recommends toggles; the user decides.

planGate.description: Auto-scaffold a plan when editing un-planned code (on-pre-edit).

toolTrace.description: Record tool-call/failure metadata for trace analysis (on-post-tool / on-tool-failure).

evaluator.description: Recommend the evaluator at the Stop gate when code changed (on-stop-verify).

contextSnapshot.description: Snapshot harness state before compaction and re-inject after (on-pre-compact / on-user-prompt).

evaluatorAutoDispatch.description: EXPERIMENTAL: auto-run the evaluator subagent via a type:agent Stop hook (non-blocking, context-only). Off by default; also requires wiring hooks/optional-auto-eval.json.

effortRouting.description: Reasoning Sandwich. When enabled, low/medium-effort turns run only 'fast'-tier gates (skips are logged). Default OFF so verification is never silently weakened by a low-effort turn.

enabled.description: Off = always run all gates regardless of effort (safe default). On = route by $CLAUDE_EFFORT.

phases.description: DEPRECATED — the maturity-phase auto-router was removed. harness-advisor ignores this key. Run `claude -p --maintenance` (harness-maintenance) to migrate to enabledCapabilities{}.

threshold.description: Warn after this many edits to one file in a session.

ignoreGlobs.description: File globs excluded from loop counting (e.g. generated files, lockfiles).

evaluator.description: Generator/Evaluator separation. Consumed by on-stop-verify (final checklist stage).

enabled.description: Run the skeptical evaluator as the last Stop-hook stage when code matching plan.codeGlob changed.

mode.description: strict => a sub-threshold rubric score blocks completion.

verificationRecipe.description: Maps each rubric dimension to the verification command / MCP tool that checks it. Consumed by the evaluator agent. Keeps MCP tool names (e.g. play_scene, get_game_screenshot) out of plugin code.
